vllm.title: follow up of #1687 when safetensors model contains 0-rank tensors
vllm.author: twaka
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I have misunderstood regarding fix of #1687.
After digging carefully, the tensor with shape [] is actually a scalar.

0-rank Tensors (tensors with shape []) are allowed, they are merely a scalar.
https://github.com/huggingface/safetensors#format

However, it seems we can't retrieve a scalar from PyS

vllm.title: Add AWQ support for all models
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #1682
This PR adds AWQ support for all models, by adding ScaledActivation.

Tested:


 MPT
 Falcon
 BLOOM
 GPTBigCode
 GPT-J
 OPT (125M)

I didn't test AWQ for GPT2, GPT-NeoX, and Phi models, since I couldn't find their quantized weights in HF model hub.

vllm.title: Support fused add rmsnorm for LLaMA
vllm.author: beginlner
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR reduces CPU overhead, increasing the end-to-end token generation speed in LLaMA by 10%.

vllm.title: [Fix] Fix warning msg on quantization
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR fixes a bug that the warning message on quantized model performance is printed for non-quantized models.

vllm.title: Bump up the version to v0.2.2
vllm.author: WoosukKwon

vllm.title: Add instructions to install vllm+cu118
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Closes #1716
This PR adds download instructions for those who want to use vllm+cu118.
